checks.name: pre-access state allows access request only
approved access allows schema probe without binding experiment

submitted_lifecycle_errors: schema_probe stage requires approved access lifecycle

checks.name: access lifecycle is consumed by schema-probe execution gate

errors_without_probe: preregister stage requires access approval evidence
preregister stage requires observed schema_probe artifact: results/watchpd_schema_probe.json
preregister stage requires schema_probe content evidence

checks.name: external preregistration requires observed schema-probe artifact

errors_without_preregistration: run stage requires observed preregistration artifact: results/preregistration_watchpd_t3_external.json
run stage requires preregistration content evidence

canonical_claim_errors: protected external experiments cannot update internal canonical claims
canonical claim update stage requires CanonicalClaimUpdateGate; ExperimentExecutionGate does not authorize internal canonical updates

checks.name: protected external experiments cannot update internal canonical claims

canonical_claim_errors: canonical claim update stage requires CanonicalClaimUpdateGate; ExperimentExecutionGate does not authorize internal canonical updates

checks.name: execution gate delegates canonical updates to reporting gate

malformed_gate_errors: observed_artifact_paths entries must be non-empty strings
malformed_ledger_errors: artifact_ledger: paths must be a tuple or list
run stage requires observed preregistration artifact: results/preregistration_watchpd_t3_external.json
run stage requires preregistration content evidence
malformed_lifecycle_errors: access_lifecycle: packet must be an AccessPacketSpec
schema_probe stage requires approved access lifecycle

checks.name: malformed execution gate objects fail closed

claim: Future external experiment runners have a reusable execution-stage gate: access request, schema probe, preregistration, and run stages are allowed only when route readiness, approved access lifecycle or approval evidence, clean schema-probe evidence, and observed prerequisite artifacts support that stage. Malformed top-level route, experiment, evidence, artifact-ledger, or observed-path inputs fail closed as validation errors. Canonical-claim updates are deliberately delegated to CanonicalClaimUpdateGate rather than authorized by ExperimentExecutionGate.
